modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Blurry image in Panopto recording from classroom camera

full_description_text:  
I am experiencing an issue with the camera used for Panopto recordings in the classroom. The image appears blurry, which affects the quality of the recordings. This problem has made it difficult to clearly see the content being captured.
short_description: Blurry image in Panopto recording from classroom camera
description: I am experiencing an issue with the camera used for Panopto recordings in the classroom. The image appears blurry, which affects the quality of the recordings. This problem has made it difficult to clearly see the content being captured.
